name: Emily Carter
comments: Velvet Whisk created the most beautiful wedding cake we could have imagined. It tasted just as incredible as it looked. Our guests are still talking about it months later.

name: Daniel Hughes
comments: The cupcakes are always fresh and perfectly frosted. I stop by almost every Friday and have never been disappointed.

name: Sophie Bennett
comments: We ordered assorted macarons and cupcakes for a company launch event. The presentation was elegant and very on-brand. Delivery was smooth and on time.

name: James Holloway
comments: Lovely atmosphere and even better cakes. The chocolate fudge cupcake is my personal favourite.

name: Olivia Turner
comments: From our tasting session to the big day, everything felt seamless. The team really listened to what we wanted and delivered a cake that matched our theme perfectly.

name: Benjamin Clarke
comments: Professional service and delicious treats. Our clients were impressed with the dessert table setup.

name: Chloe Morgan
comments: The macarons are light, airy, and full of flavour. A little on the pricey side, but worth it for a treat.

name: Matthew Collins
comments: Our three-tier cake was stunning and tasted amazing. Communication was excellent throughout.

name: Isabella Reed
comments: I love trying the seasonal flavours. You can tell everything is made with care and quality ingredients.

name: Thomas Wright
comments: Ordered for an office celebration. Great variety and beautifully packaged.

name: Grace Mitchell
comments: The cake tasting was such a fun experience and helped us choose the perfect flavours. Highly recommend for any engaged couple.

name: Henry Scott
comments: Consistently good pastries and friendly staff. Sometimes it gets busy, but it's worth the wait.

name: Amelia Brooks
comments: Fantastic catering service. The dessert table looked incredible and tasted even better.

name: Lucas Price
comments: The red velvet cake is absolutely divine. Moist, rich, and not overly sweet.

name: Ella Richardson
comments: Velvet Whisk truly understood our vision. The cake design was elegant and exactly what we described.

name: Jack Foster
comments: Great quality overall, though one time my order was slightly delayed. Still very happy with the products.

name: Lily Watson
comments: Our team loved the cupcakes. The branding details added to the icing were a lovely touch.

name: Oliver Hayes
comments: Beautiful cake, though delivery was a little later than expected. Thankfully it arrived in perfect condition.

name: Mia Long
comments: The macarons are some of the best I've had outside of Paris. Crisp shells and smooth fillings.

name: William Cooper
comments: Very professional service from start to finish. The desserts elevated our event.

name: Harper Bailey
comments: Lovely cakes and nice presentation. I just wish there were more vegan options available.

name: George Ward
comments: Good quality treats but the order confirmation took longer than expected. Overall still a positive experience.

name: Charlotte Simmons
comments: The cake was beautiful but slightly sweeter than we anticipated. Guests still enjoyed it though.

name: Samuel Jenkins
comments: Nice cupcakes but one flavour wasn't as fresh as usual. Staff handled it politely when I mentioned it.

name: Ava Knight
comments: The desserts were good, but the setup took a bit longer than planned. Nothing major, just room for improvement.

name: Noah Dixon
comments: Always impressed with the consistency and flavour combinations. A reliable go-to for sweet treats.

name: Freya Chapman
comments: Everything from consultation to delivery felt personal and thoughtful. Could not have asked for more.

name: Ethan Mason
comments: Beautifully crafted desserts that added a touch of elegance to our networking evening.

name: Scarlett Shaw
comments: The salted caramel cupcake is perfection. Soft sponge and silky frosting.

name: Leo Gardner
comments: Guests couldn't stop complimenting our cake. It looked stunning in photos too.

name: Hannah Walters
comments: Charming little bakery with consistently delicious options.

name: Archie Lawson
comments: Very smooth ordering process and excellent presentation.

name: Zoe Ellis
comments: The tasting session was fantastic and helped us decide confidently.

name: Jacob Murray
comments: Great variety and seasonal specials keep things interesting.

name: Ruby Armstrong
comments: Professional, punctual, and delicious. Will definitely order again.

name: Theo Cunningham
comments: A truly bespoke experience. The cake design matched our floral theme perfectly.

name: Evie Hunter
comments: Fresh, flavourful, and beautifully decorated every single time.

name: Oscar Barrett
comments: The dessert table added a premium feel to our annual awards night.

name: Layla West
comments: Absolutely flawless cake and fantastic communication.

name: Maxwell Grant
comments: Quality is always high and the team are welcoming.

name: Poppy Dean
comments: Great experience from enquiry to delivery. The macarons were a standout.

name: Reuben Cole
comments: We felt completely looked after. The cake tasted just as good as it looked.

name: Megan Fowler
comments: Lovely selection of cakes and pastries. Perfect weekend treat.

name: Caleb Hudson
comments: Impressive attention to detail and beautiful presentation.

name: Brooke Stevens
comments: Our guests said it was the best wedding cake they'd ever had.
